note: Sequential single-GPU training per model variant (one model loaded at a time); Adafactor optimizer (memory-efficient vs AdamW for 3B); Closed-book QA (no E5 retriever) with token-F1 reward (SQuAD-style); SDAR gate: g_t = sigma(beta*delta_t).detach() with beta=10, lambda=0.1; OPSD loss: L = -(gate * logp_student * mask).sum() / n_tok (student-sampled tokens); Teacher = frozen copy of student (same architecture, no skill context in this scope)
